day1_lunch_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_start.text: *Lunchtime. My stomach growls. It's my first day, so I don't even know where the cafeteria is...*

day1_lunch_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea asked me to eat together, so I'll stay in class
I've had a headache since earlier... maybe the nurse's office

day1_lunch_sea.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea.text: "Where do you think you're going?! We said we'd eat together~ I saved us seats!"

day1_lunch_sea_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_2.text: *Sea carefully unpacks a lunchbox. It's a two-person portion. Did she prepare this knowing I was transferring?*

day1_lunch_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_3.text: "I packed a little extra just in case. I hope it's to your liking, {name}..."

day1_lunch_sea_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_4.text: *...But is it just me, or are these all my favorite side dishes? Braised mackerel, rolled egg omelet, spinach... It has to be a coincidence.*

day1_lunch_sea_5.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_5.text: "How is it? Good? Want me to pack lunch again tomorrow? Hehe, watching you eat makes me happy too~"

day1_lunch_sea_6.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_6.text: *Having a class rep this nice is great. I think transferring here was a good call. ...But first the chocolate milk, now my favorite foods... it's a bit...*

day1_lunch_yuna_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_start.text: *I step into the library. It's nearly empty since it's lunch hour.*

day1_lunch_yuna_1.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_1.text: *Walking between the shelves, I hear a 'click' from the corner.*

day1_lunch_yuna_3.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_3.text: *A girl holding a camera stares at me, startled. ...Was she taking a photo of me?*

day1_lunch_yuna_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_4.text: "Did you just... take a photo of me?"

day1_lunch_yuna_5.name: Choi Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_5.text: "N-no! That's not it... I'm in the photography club! I was shooting the library scenery and you suddenly appeared... I'm Choi Yuna, first-year! You're the transfer student, right?"

day1_lunch_yuna_6.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_6.text: *She smiles brightly. A cute underclassman. ...But I could've sworn the camera lens was pointed at me, not the library scenery.*

day1_lunch_nurse_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_nurse_start.text: *I open the nurse's office door. The smell of disinfectant stings my nose.*

day1_lunch_riin_1.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_1.text: "My, visiting the nurse's office on your very first day. What's wrong?"

day1_lunch_riin_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_2.text: "I have a bit of a headache... Do you have any painkillers?"

day1_lunch_riin_3.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_3.text: "Fufu, sit down for a moment. Let me check you first. ...Mmm, your heartbeat is very healthy. It sounds lovely."

day1_lunch_riin_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_4.text: *...I understand she's using a stethoscope, but isn't she listening a bit too long? And the look on her face is kind of...*

day1_lunch_riin_5.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_5.text: "Here's some medicine. If you get drowsy, feel free to sleep here. I'll be watching over you. ...Fufu."

day1_lunch_alone.name: Me
day1_lunch_alone.text: *The rooftop. The breeze is nice. Some alone time isn't bad.*

day1_lunch_alone_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_alone_2.text: *I eat my lunch while looking down at the schoolyard below.*

day1_lunch_alone_3.name: Me
day1_lunch_alone_3.text: *...Huh? In the corner of the schoolyard, it looks like someone's pointing a camera up here... No, it's too far away. Must be my imagination.*

day1_lunch_end.name: Me
day1_lunch_end.text: *Lunch is over. Time to get ready for afternoon classes.*
